settings.title: Settings
settings.editProfileSub: Update your name, phone number, and photo
settings.savedAddressesSub: Manage where you want to work or post jobs
settings.comingSoonSub: Our Help Center will be available shortly.
settings.logoutAlertMessage: You can sign back in at any time to resume your job searches and bookings.
settings.deleteAccountSub: Permanently erase your data and profile
settings.deleteAlertMessage: This will permanently erase your profile, address history, and posting records. This action cannot be undone.
settings.deleteSuccessMessage: Your account has been deleted. We're sorry to see you go.
settings.deleteErrorMessage: Please check your connection and try again.
